title: Finn's Greg Expansion
body:
![Machine Line](https://i.imgur.com/0Q18yPe.png)

**About:**
Finn's Greg Expansion is an official adaptaton of [Finn's Workshop resourcepack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/finns-workshop) to support Gregtech CEu!
It includes all singleblock machine reworked textures! With new animations, 3D tools and items!
Also includes ArmorPlus and LumberJack support for NomiFactory gamers!

**Cupronickel Coil Retexture:**

![Cupronickel](https://i.imgur.com/8fSP7vL.png)

**Autoclave New Texture**:

![Autoclave](https://i.imgur.com/6IwK5Ca.png)
